message:
test(macro-recorder): add per-state snapshot/golden tests (bd-2lus.3)

9 snapshot tests covering idle, stopped, playing, error, and tiny states
at both 80x24 and 120x40 sizes. Also fixes notifications.rs compile
errors and updates existing snapshots for the new Notifications screen.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -21,4 +21,4 @@
